description_long: This is a light blue umbrella with a wide, circular canopy adorned with a delicate pattern of white and pale pink cherry blossom flowers. The canopy is divided into multiple evenly spaced segments, each separated by visible seams that radiate from the central tip. The umbrella's shaft is slender and black, extending vertically from the center of the canopy. The handle is straight and simple, with no visible curvature or ergonomic features. The tip of the umbrella is small and rounded, matching the minimalist design. The overall appearance is elegant and cheerful, making it suitable for both practical use and as a stylish accessory in urban environments.
description: A light blue umbrella with a cherry blossom floral pattern and a straight black handle, featuring a rounded tip and segmented canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cherry blossom pattern concentrated on the left side of the blue canopy, with the straight black handle visible below.
description_view_1: Side view with fewer visible flowers, mostly plain blue canopy, and the handle centered beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a more even distribution of cherry blossom flowers across the blue canopy, with the handle directly below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the densest cluster of cherry blossom flowers on the right side of the canopy, handle visible below.
